channel.title: windows on Holla
channel.description: Recent content in windows on Holla

item.title: 安裝 Chocolatey
item.description: 透過 powershell.exe 安裝 首先，你需要確保 Get-ExecutionPolicy 不是 Restricted 輸入 Get-ExcutionPolicy， 如果它顯示 Restricted， 之後請輸入 Set-ExecutionPolicy AllSigned 或者 Set-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope Process。 現在輸入以下指令 Set-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope Process -Force; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol -bor 3072; iex ((New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://community.chocolatey.org/install.ps1')) 安裝完成後, 輸入 choco 或者 choco -? 查看相關指令。
